Hamare Premium Product

Bhim Shakti Balm
Dard Ka Ramban Ilaaj

Hamare khaas Ayurvedic formula se taiyar Bhim Shakti Balm — jo har tarah ke maansapeshi dard, jodon ke dard aur thakan se turant rahat deta hai.

  • 100% Shuddh Ayurvedic Saamagri
  • Jodon aur Maansapeshiyon ke Dard Mein Rahat
  • Koi Side Effects Nahi
  • Pure & Natural Formula
  • Turant Asar karta hai
Hamare Products

Prakriti Se Liye Gaye
Shrestha Aushadhi

Ortho-XR Pain Relief Gel
Special Warming Formula ke saath — Quick & Long Lasting Relief, Hydrogel Tech, Fast Absorption. Dard se turant aur lasting rahat.
Dard Nivarak Gel
Herbal Foot Roller Massager
Lakdi ka prakritik foot massager — pair ke dard, thakan aur blood circulation ke liye. Ghar par hi paayen clinic jaisa sukoon.
Foot Therapy
Kansa Thali Foot Massager
Paaraamprik Kansa Thali se pair ki malish — shareer ki garmi nikalna, neend sudharna aur poore shareer ko relax karna.
Paaraamprik Chikitsa
Physiotherapy Seva

Advanced Machines Se
Dard Ka Ilaaj

Hamare yahan latest physiotherapy machines se pesent ka ilaj kiya jata hai. Har tarah ke dard, naso ki problem aur khoon ke daure ke liye vishesh chikitsa.

IR (Infrared) Light Therapy
Infrared light se gardan, peeth aur jodon ke dard mein rahat milti hai. Pesent ko seedha relief milta hai — koi dawa nahi, sirf prakaash ki shakti.
🔴 Gardan & Peeth Dard Mein Rahat
TENS / SONO Machine Therapy
TENS (Transcutaneous Electrical Nerve Stimulation) machine se nas ki takleef, chronic dard aur muscle spasm theek hote hain. Advanced digital control ke saath.
⚡ Nerve Stimulation Therapy
